urdu transliteration text:
Akber tuje kasam hai waapas zaroor aana
Ek baar aake apni maadar ko dekh jaana
Just once, come to see your mother
Akber tuje kasam hai waapas zaroor aana
english translation text:
Akber, promise me that you will return (from the battlefield)
Akber, promise me that you will return (from the battlefield)

urdu transliteration text:
Maa jaanti hai beta marne ko jaa raha hai
Aur baap keh raha aansu nahi bahana
english translation text:
Your mother knows that her son
is going to die
And your father says “do not shed tears.”

urdu transliteration text: Akber tuje kasam hai waapas zaroor aana
english translation text: Akber, promise me that you will return (from the battlefield)

urdu transliteration text:
Zainab nai tujhko beta, atthara saal paala
Woh chaahti hai beta, Dulha tujhe banana
O’ Son, Zainab raised you for eighteen years,
english translation text: O’ Son, she wishes to see you as a groom.

urdu transliteration text: Akber tuje kasam hai waapas zaroor aana
english translation text: Akber, promise me that you will return (from the battlefield)

urdu transliteration text:
Qatil badha jo aage, Kehne lagi jawani
Hum shakl-e-Mustafa hai, Barchi nahi lagana
english translation text:
As the slayer stepped forward, the Youth said:
“He resembles the Prophet, strike not the spear”.

urdu transliteration text: Akber tuje kasam hai waapas zaroor aana
english translation text: Akber, promise me that you will return (from the battlefield)

urdu transliteration text:
Daude hussain fauran, thame hue jigar ko
Kehte hue aye beta, Mushkil hai mera aana
Hussain rushed forth, hand upon heart
english translation text: Saying: “O’ my son, it’s hard for me to come (to your corpse)”

urdu transliteration text: Akber tuje kasam hai waapas zaroor aana
english translation text: Akber, promise me that you will return (from the battlefield)

urdu transliteration text:
Ponche khareeb jis dam phir gir pade zameen par
Aandhair tha nazar mai, Shabbir ko zamana
The world turned dark in Shabbir’s eyes
english translation text: He (Imam) came near (the corpse) and fell to the ground

urdu transliteration text: Akber tuje kasam hai waapas zaroor aana
english translation text: Akber, promise me that you will return (from the battlefield)

urdu transliteration text:
Sheh se na uth saki jab, kadyal jawan ki mayyit
bachoon ke saath milkar, laasha pada uthana
english translation text:
When the Imam was unable to carry the budding youth’s corpse
Together with some children he had to carry the corpse

urdu transliteration text: Akber tuje kasam hai waapas zaroor aana
english translation text: Akber, promise me that you will return (from the battlefield)

urdu transliteration text:
Laashe ko rakh keh bole, Laila se ye sheh-e-deen
Bête ki aake apni, Mannat zara badhana
Come fulfil your son’s pledge
english translation text: Laying the corpse before her, said the King of Religion to Laila

urdu transliteration text:
Akber tujhe kasam hai waapas zaroor aana
Ek baar aake apni maadar ko dekh jaana
Just once, come to see your mother
english translation text: Akber, promise me that you will return (from the battlefield)
